brief_html: Creates a game in a manner similar to SID_STARTADVEX2 and SID_STARTADVEX3.
format:
(UINT32) Game State
(UINT32) Game Elapsed Time (in seconds)
(UINT16) Game Type
(UINT16) Parameter
(UINT32) Unknown (0x00)
(UINT32) Unknown (Likely ladder, but will always be 0x00 because there is no SSHR ladder)
(STRING) Game name
(STRING) Game password
(STRING) Game Statstring
remarks_html:
Creates a game in a manner similar to SID_STARTADVEX2 and SID_STARTADVEX3.

This is only used by Starcraft Shareware.

See documentation on SID_STARTADVEX3 for details on the values and their meanings.
